name: cortex-plugin-compliance
description: Policy rule packs for SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS compliance auditing
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: compliance_audit
tools.description: Run a compliance audit against a target path using a specified framework

params.name: target_path
params.description: Path to the target file or directory to audit

params.name: output_format
params.description: Output format for the audit results

tools.name: compliance_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a compliance report from audit findings

params.name: findings
params.description: JSON array of findings from a previous audit

params.name: include_remediation
params.description: Include remediation guidance in the report

tools.name: compliance_list_rules
tools.description: List rules for a specific compliance framework

tools.name: compliance_check_policy
tools.description: Check a target path against a specific compliance rule

params.name: target_path
params.description: Path to the target file or directory

tools.name: compliance_evidence
tools.description: Collect evidence for a specific compliance control
